# nepali-geo-pro-max — LLM cheat sheet

> Nepal administrative divisions library covering BOTH the current federal hierarchy (post-2015 constitution / post-2017 local-level reorg) AND the legacy hierarchy (pre-2015 development regions / zones, pre-2017 75 districts, VDCs).
> Current: 7 provinces · 77 districts · **all 753 local-level units** (6 metro + 11 sub-metro + 276 municipalities + 460 rural municipalities) with bilingual names and ward counts · postal codes (metro/sub-metro) · fuzzy search · address formatter / parser / validator.
> Legacy: 5 regions · 14 zones · 75 districts · cross-walks to current districts · VDC API.
> TypeScript-first. Zero deps. ESM + CJS.

## TL;DR — current hierarchy

| You want… | Call |
|---|---|
| All provinces | `getProvinces()` → 7 |
| Province by name/id/number/alias | `getProvince("Bagmati" \| 3 \| "P3" \| "बागमती" \| "Province 3")` |
| All districts | `getDistricts()` → 77 |
| District by name/id/alias | `getDistrict("Kathmandu" \| "Kavre" \| "P3.D05")` |
| Districts of a province | `getDistrictsByProvince("Bagmati")` |
| All local units | `getLocalUnits()` → **753** (6+11+276+460) |
| Local unit by name/alias | `getLocalUnit("KMC" \| "Patan" \| "Lalitpur Metropolitan City")` |
| Lookup by postal code | `findByPostalCode("44600")` → KMC |
| Postal-code tables | `POSTAL_CODES`, `POSTAL_CODE_BRANCHES`, `DISTRICT_POSTCODE_PREFIXES` |
| Walk parents | `getParents("P3.D05.L01")` |
| Fuzzy + bilingual search | `search("ललितपुर")` or `search("Lalipur")` |
| Format an address | `formatAddress(parts, { locale?, style? })` |
| Parse free-form input | `parseAddress(raw).parts` (returns IDs) |
| Validate an address | `validateAddress(parts).ok` |

## TL;DR — legacy hierarchy (pre-2015 / pre-2017)

| You want… | Call |
|---|---|
| All 5 development regions | `getRegions()` |
| Region by name/id/number/alias | `getRegion("Western" \| 3 \| "R3" \| "पूर्वाञ्चल")` |
| All 14 zones | `getZones()` |
| Zone by name/id | `getZone("Bagmati" \| "Z05")` |
| Zones in a region | `getZonesByRegion("R1")` |
| All 75 legacy districts | `getLegacyDistricts()` |
| Legacy district by name/id/alias | `getLegacyDistrict("Kathmandu" \| "LD23" \| "Kavre")` |
| Legacy districts in a zone | `getLegacyDistrictsByZone("Bagmati")` → 8 |
| Legacy districts in a region | `getLegacyDistrictsByRegion("Mid-Western")` → 15 |
| Cross-walk: legacy → current | `getCurrentDistrictsForLegacyDistrict("Nawalparasi")` → [Nawalpur, Parasi] |
| Cross-walk: current → legacy | `getLegacyDistrictForCurrentDistrict("Eastern Rukum")` → Rukum |
| Full cross-walk | `crossWalk("Kathmandu")` → `{ legacy, current[], zone, region }` |
| VDCs (registry) | `getVdcs()`, `getVdc(name)`, `registerVdcs([...])` |

## Mental model (8 rules)

1. **Two hierarchies coexist**:
   - Current (post-2015 / 2017): Province → District → LocalUnit → Ward. IDs: `P3.D05.L01.W05`.
   - Legacy (pre-2015 / 2017): Region → Zone → LegacyDistrict → VDC. IDs: `R2 / Z05 / LD23 / LD23.V001`.
2. **Bilingual everywhere**: every record has `nameEn` (Roman) + `nameNe` (Devanagari). Lookups accept either.
3. **Aliases work**: `getDistrict("Kavre")` → "Kavrepalanchok"; `getLocalUnit("KMC")` → KMC; `getProvince("Province 3")` → Bagmati; `getRegion("Far-West")` → R5; `getLegacyDistrict("Kavre")` → Kavrepalanchok.
4. **Cross-walks bridge legacy ↔ current**: `getCurrentDistrictsForLegacyDistrict("Nawalparasi")` returns 2 districts (Nawalpur + Parasi); `getLegacyDistrictForCurrentDistrict("Eastern Rukum")` returns Rukum.
5. **Search is fuzzy + bilingual**: `search("Lalipur")` (typo) and `search("ललितपुर")` both succeed. (Search currently covers current hierarchy only.)
6. **Parser stores IDs, formatter shows names**: round-trip with `formatAddress(parseAddress(s).parts)`.
7. **v1 ships full data for current 7+77+17 and full legacy 5+14+75**. Modern municipalities (276+460) and VDCs (~3,915) are populated incrementally — VDCs via `registerVdcs()` runtime hook.
8. **Validation chains**: `validateAddress({province, district, localUnit, ward})` cross-checks the modern hierarchy. Legacy predicates: `isValidRegion`, `isValidZone`, `isValidLegacyDistrict`.

## Authoritative counts — current hierarchy

| Level | Total | Shipped |
|---|---|---|
| Provinces | 7 | 7 ✅ |
| Districts | 77 | 77 ✅ |
| Metropolitan | 6 | 6 ✅ |
| Sub-metropolitan | 11 | 11 ✅ |
| Municipalities | 276 | 276 ✅ |
| Rural municipalities | 460 | 460 ✅ |
| **Total local-level units** | **753** | **753 ✅** |
| Postal codes (palika) | 753 | **193** (25.6%) ⏳ |
| District postcode prefixes | 77 | 77 ✅ |

Sources:
- Palikas: [`sagautam5/local-states-nepal`](https://github.com/sagautam5/local-states-nepal) (MIT-licensed) — bilingual JSON cross-validated against 6/11/276/460/753 invariants.
- Postal codes: Wikipedia "Postal codes in Nepal" + Nepal General Post Office (gpo.gov.np). Uses **legacy 1991 codes** (still operationally dominant); a parallel 2025 federal-aligned system exists but isn't yet used in everyday post. ~74% of palikas don't have an authoritative legacy code because most rural municipalities formed in 2017 by merging former VDCs — those POs still carry the old VDC name. Codes are **omitted rather than fabricated** for those palikas.

District distribution by province:
- P1 Koshi: 14
- P2 Madhesh: 8
- P3 Bagmati: 13
- P4 Gandaki: 11
- P5 Lumbini: 12
- P6 Karnali: 10
- P7 Sudurpashchim: 9

## Authoritative counts — legacy hierarchy

| Level | Total | Shipped (v1) |
|---|---|---|
| Development regions | 5 | 5 ✅ |
| Zones | 14 | 14 ✅ |
| Legacy districts | 75 | 75 ✅ |
| VDCs (`registerVdcs` API) | ~3,915 | 0 ⏳ |

Region → Zones → Districts:
- R1 Eastern: Mechi (4), Koshi (6), Sagarmatha (6) = 16
- R2 Central: Janakpur (6), Bagmati (8), Narayani (5) = 19
- R3 Western: Gandaki (6), Lumbini (6), Dhaulagiri (4) = 16
- R4 Mid-Western: Rapti (5), Bheri (5), Karnali (5) = 15
- R5 Far-Western: Seti (5), Mahakali (4) = 9
- Total: 4+6+6 + 6+8+5 + 6+6+4 + 5+5+5 + 5+4 = 75 ✓

Legacy → Current district splits:
- Nawalparasi → [Nawalpur (P4.D08), Parasi (P5.D09)]
- Rukum → [Eastern Rukum (P5.D05), Western Rukum (P6.D10)]
- All other 73 legacy districts → 1:1 to a single modern district.

## Type signatures (verbatim)

```ts
// Current hierarchy
type ProvinceId = `P${1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | 7}`;
type DistrictId = `${ProvinceId}.D${string}`;
type LocalUnitId = `${DistrictId}.L${string}`;
type WardId = `${LocalUnitId}.W${string}`;
type LocalUnitType = "metropolitan" | "sub-metropolitan" | "municipality" | "rural-municipality";

// Legacy hierarchy
type RegionId = `R${1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5}`;
type ZoneId = `Z${string}`;
type LegacyDistrictId = `LD${string}`;
type VdcId = `${LegacyDistrictId}.V${string}`;

interface LatLng { lat: number; lng: number; }

interface Province {
  id: ProvinceId; number: 1|2|3|4|5|6|7;
  nameEn: string; nameNe: string;
  capital: string; capitalNe: string; capitalCoords: LatLng;
  areaKm2: number; population: number;
  slug: string; aliases: readonly string[];
}

interface District {
  id: DistrictId; nameEn: string; nameNe: string;
  provinceId: ProvinceId;
  headquarters: string; headquartersNe?: string;
  slug: string; aliases: readonly string[];
}

interface LocalUnit {
  id: LocalUnitId; nameEn: string; nameNe: string;
  type: LocalUnitType; districtId: DistrictId;
  wards: number; coords?: LatLng; postalCode?: string;
  slug: string; aliases: readonly string[];
}

interface AddressParts {
  province?: string; district?: string; localUnit?: string;
  ward?: number; tole?: string; house?: string; postalCode?: string;
}

interface AddressValidationResult {
  ok: boolean;
  errors: ReadonlyArray<{ field: keyof AddressParts; code: "missing"|"unknown"|"mismatch"; message: string }>;
  resolved?: { province?: Province; district?: District; localUnit?: LocalUnit };
}

interface SearchHit { level: "province"|"district"|"local-unit"; record: Province|District|LocalUnit; score: number; }

// Lookups
function getProvinces(): readonly Province[];
function getProvince(query: string | number | ProvinceId): Province | undefined;
function getDistricts(): readonly District[];
function getDistrict(query: string | DistrictId): District | undefined;
function getDistrictsByProvince(province: string | number | ProvinceId): readonly District[];
function getLocalUnits(): readonly LocalUnit[];
function getLocalUnit(query: string | LocalUnitId): LocalUnit | undefined;
function getLocalUnitsByDistrict(district: string | DistrictId): readonly LocalUnit[];
function getLocalUnitsByProvince(province: string | number | ProvinceId): readonly LocalUnit[];
function findByPostalCode(code: string): LocalUnit | undefined;
function getParents(id: DistrictId | LocalUnitId): { province?: Province; district?: District; localUnit?: LocalUnit };

// Iterators
function eachProvince(): IterableIterator<Province>;
function eachDistrict(): IterableIterator<District>;
function eachLocalUnit(): IterableIterator<LocalUnit>;

// Validation
function isValidProvince(query: string | number): boolean;
function isValidDistrict(query: string): boolean;
function isValidLocalUnit(query: string): boolean;
function isValidWard(localUnit: string | LocalUnitId, ward: number): boolean;

// Search
interface SearchOptions {
  levels?: ReadonlyArray<"province" | "district" | "local-unit">;
  limit?: number;
  threshold?: number;
}
function search(query: string, options?: SearchOptions): SearchHit[];

// Format / Parse / Validate
interface FormatAddressOptions {
  locale?: "en" | "ne";
  style?: "short" | "long" | "postal";
  separator?: string;
}
function formatAddress(parts: AddressParts, options?: FormatAddressOptions): string;

interface ParsedAddress {
  parts: AddressParts;
  confidence: number;
  unmatched: readonly string[];
}
function parseAddress(raw: string): ParsedAddress;
function validateAddress(parts: AddressParts): AddressValidationResult;

// --- Legacy lookups ---
interface Region {
  id: RegionId; number: 1|2|3|4|5;
  nameEn: string; nameNe: string;
  capital: string; capitalNe: string;
  slug: string; aliases: readonly string[];
}
interface Zone {
  id: ZoneId; nameEn: string; nameNe: string;
  regionId: RegionId; headquarters: string;
  slug: string; aliases: readonly string[];
}
interface LegacyDistrict {
  id: LegacyDistrictId; nameEn: string; nameNe: string;
  zoneId: ZoneId; headquarters: string;
  currentDistrictIds: readonly DistrictId[];   // 1 element usually, 2 for Nawalparasi & Rukum
  slug: string; aliases: readonly string[];
}
interface Vdc {
  id: VdcId; nameEn: string; nameNe: string;
  legacyDistrictId: LegacyDistrictId; wards: number;
  slug: string; aliases: readonly string[];
}
interface CrossWalkResult {
  legacy?: LegacyDistrict;
  current?: readonly District[];
  zone?: Zone;
  region?: Region;
}

function getRegions(): readonly Region[];
function getRegion(query: string | number | RegionId): Region | undefined;
function getZones(): readonly Zone[];
function getZone(query: string | ZoneId): Zone | undefined;
function getZonesByRegion(region: string | number | RegionId): readonly Zone[];
function getLegacyDistricts(): readonly LegacyDistrict[];
function getLegacyDistrict(query: string | LegacyDistrictId): LegacyDistrict | undefined;
function getLegacyDistrictsByZone(zone: string | ZoneId): readonly LegacyDistrict[];
function getLegacyDistrictsByRegion(region: string | number | RegionId): readonly LegacyDistrict[];
function getCurrentDistrictsForLegacyDistrict(legacy: string | LegacyDistrictId): readonly District[];
function getLegacyDistrictForCurrentDistrict(current: string | DistrictId): LegacyDistrict | undefined;
function crossWalk(legacy: string | LegacyDistrictId): CrossWalkResult;
function getVdcs(): readonly Vdc[];
function getVdc(query: string): Vdc | undefined;
function getVdcsByLegacyDistrict(legacyDistrict: string | LegacyDistrictId): readonly Vdc[];
function registerVdcs(vdcs: readonly Vdc[]): number;     // append, returns total
function setVdcs(vdcs: readonly Vdc[]): number;          // replace
function clearVdcs(): void;
function isValidRegion(query: string | number): boolean;
function isValidZone(query: string): boolean;
function isValidLegacyDistrict(query: string): boolean;
function eachRegion(): IterableIterator<Region>;
function eachZone(): IterableIterator<Zone>;
function eachLegacyDistrict(): IterableIterator<LegacyDistrict>;

// Constants
const REGIONS: readonly Region[];                // length 5
const ZONES: readonly Zone[];                    // length 14
const LEGACY_DISTRICTS: readonly LegacyDistrict[];  // length 75
const TOTAL_LEGACY_DISTRICTS = 75;
const APPROX_TOTAL_VDCS = 3_915;
```

## Common patterns

### Province → district dropdown

```ts
const provinces = getProvinces();
const districts = getDistrictsByProvince(provinceId);
```

### Bilingual fuzzy search

```ts
search("Bagmati");          // English
search("बागमती");            // Devanagari
search("Lalipur");          // typo → Lalitpur
search("KMC");              // alias → Kathmandu Metropolitan City
search("q", { levels: ["local-unit"], threshold: 0.5, limit: 5 });
```

### Round-trip address normalization

```ts
const raw = "ward 5, KMC, Kathmandu";
const { parts } = parseAddress(raw);
formatAddress(parts);    // "Ward 5, Kathmandu Metropolitan City, Kathmandu, Bagmati Province"
```

### Postal-code reverse lookup

```ts
const unit = findByPostalCode("44600");
const { province, district } = getParents(unit!.id);
```

### Validate

```ts
const r = validateAddress({ province: "Bagmati", district: "Kaski" });
// r.ok === false
// r.errors[0].code === "mismatch"
```

### Migrate archived district records (legacy → current)

```ts
// Old voter roll references "Nawalparasi" but new addresses need
// to be split into Nawalpur (P4) or Parasi (P5).
const moderns = getCurrentDistrictsForLegacyDistrict("Nawalparasi");
// → [<Nawalpur>, <Parasi>]   — disambiguate by VDC name or coords
```

### Render legacy region label on a report

```ts
const cw = crossWalk("Kathmandu");
// `${cw.region?.nameEn} > ${cw.zone?.nameEn} > ${cw.legacy?.nameEn}`
// "Central Development Region > Bagmati > Kathmandu"
```

### Use legacy VDC names from a CSV

```ts
import { registerVdcs, getVdc } from "nepali-geo-pro-max";
// Load CSV → array of Vdc records → register
registerVdcs(myVdcsArray);
getVdc("Sankhu");          // resolves
```

## Anti-patterns

| Don't | Do |
|---|---|
| Hard-code district names | use `getDistrict("Kathmandu")` (handles aliases) |
| Match `nameEn` strictly | use `search()` for user input (fuzzy + bilingual) |
| Store names as user input | parse → store IDs (`P3.D05.L01`) → display via formatter |
| Ship `Province 3` in UI | resolve via `getProvince("Province 3")` then show `.nameEn` ("Bagmati") |
| Hardcode 75 districts for new data | use 77 (`getDistrict`); use 75 (`getLegacyDistrict`) only for archived records |
| Use `Far Western` | use canonical `"Sudurpashchim"` (also accepted as alias) |
| Treat legacy `Nawalparasi` as current | cross-walk via `getCurrentDistrictsForLegacyDistrict` (returns 2 modern districts) |
| Mix legacy zone with current province in same field | keep two columns or normalize first via `crossWalk` |

## Imports cheat sheet

```ts
import {
  // Current lookups
  getProvinces, getProvince,
  getDistricts, getDistrict, getDistrictsByProvince,
  getLocalUnits, getLocalUnit, getLocalUnitsByDistrict, getLocalUnitsByProvince,
  findByPostalCode, getParents,
  eachProvince, eachDistrict, eachLocalUnit,
  isValidProvince, isValidDistrict, isValidLocalUnit, isValidWard,
  // Legacy lookups
  getRegions, getRegion,
  getZones, getZone, getZonesByRegion,
  getLegacyDistricts, getLegacyDistrict, getLegacyDistrictsByZone, getLegacyDistrictsByRegion,
  getCurrentDistrictsForLegacyDistrict, getLegacyDistrictForCurrentDistrict, crossWalk,
  getVdcs, getVdc, getVdcsByLegacyDistrict, registerVdcs, setVdcs, clearVdcs,
  isValidRegion, isValidZone, isValidLegacyDistrict,
  eachRegion, eachZone, eachLegacyDistrict,
  // Search / format / parse / validate (current hierarchy)
  search, formatAddress, parseAddress, validateAddress,
  // Constants
  PROVINCES, DISTRICTS, LOCAL_UNITS,
  REGIONS, ZONES, LEGACY_DISTRICTS,
  POSTAL_CODES, POSTAL_CODE_BRANCHES, DISTRICT_POSTCODE_PREFIXES,
  DISTRICTS_BY_PROVINCE_COUNT,
  LOCAL_UNIT_TYPE_COUNTS, TOTAL_LOCAL_UNITS,
  TOTAL_LEGACY_DISTRICTS, APPROX_TOTAL_VDCS,
} from "nepali-geo-pro-max";

// Types
import type {
  // Current
  Province, District, LocalUnit, Ward,
  ProvinceId, DistrictId, LocalUnitId, WardId, LocalUnitType,
  LatLng, AddressParts, AddressValidationResult, SearchHit,
  // Legacy
  Region, Zone, LegacyDistrict, Vdc,
  RegionId, ZoneId, LegacyDistrictId, VdcId,
  CrossWalkResult,
} from "nepali-geo-pro-max";
```

## Roadmap

- ✅ v1.0: full 753 palika dataset
- ✅ v1.1: postal codes (193/753 palikas + all 77 district prefixes)
- v1.2: postal-code coverage expansion via palika-ward-to-VDC research
- v1.x: seed `LEGACY_VDCS` with verified VDC data (PRs welcome)
- v2.0: ward-level data + boundary GeoJSON via subpath imports
- v2.x: `getProvinceByCoords(lat, lng)` point-in-polygon
- v2.x: switch to new 2025 GPO federal-aligned codes once Nepal Post operationalizes them
